analyst_note: Q3 2024: Payment volumes dropped sharply after July despite rising victim counts — key divergence signal. Dark Angels received record $75M payment (confirmed Q2-Q3 boundary). Chainalysis noted H2 2024 payments dropped 37.5% vs H2 2023. RansomHub solidified as dominant group. Scattered Spider-linked arrests began. Victim count slightly up QoQ (1,257 vs 1,248).

a1._label: Russian Domestic Actions Against Ecosystem Actors
a1.notes: No documented Russian domestic actions Q3 2024. Khoroshev sanctions had no Russian domestic follow-on. RU government posture: passive tolerance.

a2._label: Time Lag: Referral to Observable Russian Action

a3.notes: Populate from analyst model. No observable protection relationship disruption this quarter.

events.name: Scattered Spider — Multiple Arrests (US/UK)
events.notes: Multiple Scattered Spider members arrested across US and UK through Q3 2024. English-speaking affiliate network, not RU/CIS core. Score: 6 — mid-tier actors, cooperation output moderate, ecosystem impact limited to social engineering supply chain.

b1.notes: Q3 2024 LE actions primarily targeting English-speaking affiliates, not RU/CIS core infrastructure. Limited direct ecosystem impact on the RU-centric model being measured.

b2.notes: RansomHub consolidating affiliate base. New brands emerging (Cicada3301 appeared Q3). Play and Akira showed volume increase — affiliate migration from disrupted groups. Forum dispute volume elevated but stabilizing. ANALYST INFERENCE.

c1._label: Ransom Payment Volume vs. Victim Count
c1.source: Chainalysis H2 2024 data ($353.75M total H2 est.); ransomware.live Q3 victim count = 1,257
c1.notes: CREDIBILITY NOTE: Payment volume is ANALYST ESTIMATE from H2 total. Chainalysis specifically noted payments dropped sharply after July 2024, with H2 down 37.5% YoY. Divergence signal emerging: victims flat while payments declining. Dark Angels $75M payment likely classified in Q2-Q3 boundary — may inflate this estimate.

c2.notes: Overall payment rate declining through 2024. Populate from Coveware Q3 2024 report. Healthcare sector pressure remained high following Change Healthcare fallout (sector reluctance to pay increased due to regulatory scrutiny).

c3.source: ransomware.live Q3 2024; Corvus Insurance Q3 2024 Cyber Threat Report
c3.notes: Post volume slightly up QoQ (+0.7%). No significant LE-initiated takedowns in Q3. RansomHub dominant. LockBit still posting but at significantly reduced volume. Divergence metric confirmed: victims flat/up while payments declining.
